---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new workload or command
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary
What would you like cb365 to do?

## Use Case
How would you use this? (CLI scripts, AI agent, CI/CD pipeline, etc.)

## Graph API Endpoint
If known, which Microsoft Graph endpoint would this use?

## Proposed Commands
```
cb365 <workload> <action> [flags]
```
